name: Future Generation Australia Limited
analysis: FGX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3412. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$1.3412, stop A$1.2870, target A$1.3777. Risk/reward is 0.67:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
